Text.Page:
We're getting the slaves out. I don't care how hard it is—this is happening.

There's only one problem. {@LinkCreature:212#1018#Tairia} devised the plan, but then she was captured on a scouting mission.

Please, can you find her? We might be able to free the slaves without her, but she's really the brains behind it all.

The cannibals are worse than we ever imagined. Day and night, all I hear is screaming.

We must get out quickly before they notice!
